nasb.text: then the priest shall look, and if the bright spots on the skin of their bodies are a faint white, it is eczema that has broken out on the skin; he is clean.

esv.text: the priest shall look, and if the spots on the skin of the body are of a dull white, it is leukoderma that has broken out in the skin; he is clean.

cnv.text: 祭司就要察看；如果發現斑點在皮肉上呈灰白色，這是皮膚出疹，那人是潔淨的。

ccb.text: 祭司要检查患处，若发现斑呈灰白色，就是皮疹，那人是洁净的。
